Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CORRECT DISMISSAL

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Electric Owl Studio, Inc.'s motion to correct dismissal is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. The dismissal of this case filed September 29, 2023 is corrected to be a dismissal without prejudice. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
